ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genetic_parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic part */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genetic part */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the genetic part (e.g., DNA, RNA, protein) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genetic part */,
  "ontology_term" TEXT /* Ontology term associated with the genetic part (e.g., SBOL, DCTERMS) */,
  "sequence_type" TEXT /* Type of sequence (e.g., DNA, RNA, protein) */,
  "sequence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the sequence */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the genetic part */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genetic part was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the genetic part */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genetic part was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biological_designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biological design */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the biological design */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the biological design */,
  "design_type" TEXT /* Type of biological design (e.g., genetic circuit, metabolic pathway) */,
  "design_type_version" TEXT /* Version of the design type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the biological design */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the biological design */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the biological design was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the biological design */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the biological design was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental data point */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic part associated with the data */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the biological design associated with the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of experimental data (e.g., fluorescence, growth rate) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the experimental data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the experimental data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the experimental data */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the experimental data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experimental data was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the experimental data */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experimental data was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_data_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES genetic_parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_data_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES biological_designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ontologies" (
  "ontology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ontology */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the ontology */,
  "namespace_url" TEXT /* Namespace URL for the ontology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ontology */,
  "ontology_version" TEXT /* Version of the ontology */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the ontology */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the ontology */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ontology was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the ontology */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ontology was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ontology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ontology_terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ontology term */,
  "ontology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ontology that the term belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the ontology term */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ontology term */,
  "term_version" TEXT /* Version of the ontology term */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the ontology term */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the ontology term */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ontology term was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the ontology term */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ontology term was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_ontology_terms" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic part */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ontology term associated with the part */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the relationship */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id", "term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_ontology_terms" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the biological design */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ontology term associated with the design */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the relationship */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id", "term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or lab of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title or position of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., experimental, simulated) */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the dataset */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_components" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component (genetic part or biological design) */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of component (genetic part, biological design) */,
  "component_role" TEXT /* Role of the component in the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the relationship */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read-only, edit, delete) */,
  "access_level_description" TEXT /* Description of the access level */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the access control rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control rule was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the access control rule */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control rule was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental condition */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of experimental condition (e.g., temperature, pH) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the experimental condition */,
  "condition_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the condition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the experimental condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experimental condition was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the experimental condition */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experimental condition was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_conditions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrumentation" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., microscope, spectrophotometer) */,
  "settings" TEXT /* Settings used for the instrument (e.g., wavelength, gain) */,
  "instrument_model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "instrument_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the instrumentation record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrumentation record was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the instrumentation record */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrumentation record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrumentation_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "publication_doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "publication_pmid" TEXT /* PMID of the publication */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the publication record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the publication record was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the publication record */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the publication record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding award */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Funding agency (e.g., NIH, NSF) */,
  "award_number" TEXT /* Award number */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the award */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the award */,
  "funding_agency_url" TEXT /* URL of the funding agency */,
  "funding_program" TEXT /* Funding program */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the funding record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the funding record was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the funding record */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the funding record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acknowledgments" (
  "acknowledgment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acknowledgment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "text" TEXT /* Acknowledgment text */,
  "acknowledgment_type" TEXT /* Type of acknowledgment (e.g., person, organization) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the acknowledgment record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the acknowledgment record was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the acknowledgment record */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the acknowledgment record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acknowledgment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acknowledgments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
